selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: the outcome-free M119-08 card posits that the fixed November-through-April half-year captures a recurring equity seasonal risk premium while May-through-October remains inactive cash

signal.source_card: M119-08 fixed Halloween SPY/cash seasonality, frozen outcome-free in Issue 119 comment 5037780018
signal.series: deterministic Gregorian month of each accepted XNYS holding-start execution session
signal.selection: read only the month number of the already accepted holding-start execution session; no market value or outcome enters state construction
signal.comparison: month belongs to the fixed set {11,12,1,2,3,4} or the fixed complement {5,6,7,8,9,10}
signal.target_rule: November through April means SPY weight 1.0; May through October means SPY weight 0.0 and inactive zero-return cash
signal.split_baseline: each monthly interval is labeled independently from its own holding-start execution month
signal.missing_rule: fail closed if the accepted XNYS execution schedule is missing, late, non-contiguous or identity-mismatched; no date optimization, alternate six-month window, day offset, filter, T-bill accrual or signal fusion

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 08:59:59.999999 America/New_York on the accepted holding-start execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw SPY close on the preceding accepted signal session, available before target submission
timing_and_account.benchmark: buy-and-hold SPY over identical selected split endpoints with identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
uncentered type-7 0.0000003814697265625 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(8000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the frozen six-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof that all serial dependence is covered

source_identities.spy_bundle_reuse_boundary: only execution, calendar, lifecycle, corporate-action and price identities are reused; all embedded C3 policy-state values are ignored and cannot affect this signal
source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
